CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Transaction_Source__c, "Affiliate"), "AFF", IF( ISPICKVAL(Transaction_Source__c, "Licensee/POS"), "LIC", "10x")) + CASESAFEID(Id) + "__" + CASESAFEID(AccountId) + IF(ISNULL(Genetic_Test_ReShip_Attempt__c), "", "__" + TEXT(Genetic_Test_ReShip_Attempt__c))
CustomField.label: Genetic Test Request Id
